noteArchitectureCloseout.resultSummary: Recorded Data Checking at Dropbox as a NOTE-mode Architecture source. Retained value is a bounded checker-system pattern set for Directive Workspace: ask when a dedicated consistency checker is actually needed, separate checker execution from reporting and remediation concerns, track violations and cursor progress explicitly, keep alert escalation simple for operators, and periodically test the checkers themselves. Out of scope: distributed worker infrastructure, auto-remediation execution, large-scale data-repair pipelines, or any host/runtime execution seam.
